docket_entries.description: ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDETH, BARBARA INDIIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCSEEON -INTEREST- TO DECEDENT JAMES MERIDETH MERIDETH, KATHERINE WHITTENBERG, JILL MERIDETH, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY DOES ONE THROUGH SEVENTY=FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-15-2009

PRELIMINARY FACT SHEET/NEW FILING/ASBESTOS LITIGATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDETH, BARBARA INDIIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCSEEON -INTEREST- TO DECEDENT JAMES MERIDETH MERIDETH, KATHERINE WHITTENBERG, JILL MERIDETH, GREGORY

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO BARBARA MERIDETH, AND GREGORY MERIDETH, AND JILL WHITTENBERG, AND KATHERINE MERIDETH SET FOR APR-23-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 AS TO WHY DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN FILED. NOTICE GIVEN IN OPEN COURT AT 4-15-09 STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE ON THE RECORD. JUDGE MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN (206)
CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO DOES ONE THROUGH SEVENTY=FIVE, INCLUSIVE PER COURT'S ORDER AT APR-15-2009 STATUS CONFERENCE. JUDGE MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: JOE VICSTEIN (206)

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON APR-23-2009 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN FILED WAS HELD. THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL CONFER ON THE STATUS OF NON-ANSWERING DEFENDANTS. THE COURT ORDERED THIS CASE TO JOIN OTHER CASES IN CLAPPER GROUP 38. TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/20/09 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR IS SET FOR 7/9/09 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PLAINTIFF TO REPORT ON THE STATUS OF DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF TRIAL AND CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ/D. LOK; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2009 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT 206

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-09-2009 TO ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-16-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PROOF OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098 (206)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 26085046)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 26109664)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-16-2009. ATTY. MATSON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE TO GO OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
MASTER JURY ASBESTOS CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-20-2009 VACATED. DISMISSAL ON FILE. (206)
